notes: windows-mcp AVAILABLE and used. (2) CDP instance on port 9222 (also logged-in) IS engine-routed: every load of gemini.google.com/ and /app is page-replaced by the APF engine block (full HTML id=apf-warning-banner, self-reattaching MutationObserver, 10s auto-remove) containing '보안 정책' — engine demonstrably firing on gemini. Because gemini is page-blocked at LOAD on the engine-routed instance, no composer is reachable there, so a FRESH PII prompt could not be submitted (the visible block is engine-triggered, most likely by PII in the account's conversation history from prior gemini3 tests #1397/#1424, not by a new submission). Could not complete the submit-then-observe flow end-to-end, hence conservative FAIL_NOT_RENDERED. Consistent with pre-existing gemini3 FE-parse baseline: engine fires; the in-chat 차단 warning does not render through BardChatUi (here it instead surfaced as a document-level page-replacement on bare load). expected_text '보안 정책' WAS visible in the engine page-replacement block on the engine-routed instance.
